hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?|css|json)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" --log-level warn 2>/dev/null; fi
cd /c/Users/ivanm/OneDrive/Escritorio/Development/notification-airport && echo '\n--- TypeScript check ---' && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo '--- Done ---'
